arts.ttl: Newcastle United star set to sign new contract ‘imminently’
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe has revealed that one of his star players is set to sign a new contract very soon. The Magpies have six players whose current deals are set to run out at the end of this season, but at least one of them will extend their stay at St. James’ Park […] The post Newcastle United star set to sign new contract ‘imminently’ first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe wants ‘game-changing’ return to Champions League
arts.sum: The sixth-placed Magpies played in the Champions League last season for the first time in 20 years.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United announce rebuilding plan as key man signs new contract
arts.sum: In a tone setting press conference for the last 10 game of the season - which starts with a home game against Brentford - Howe underlined the importance of getting into the Champions League for financial reasons. Speaking at his press conference, Howe said: "Fabian will sign a new deal imminently — if he hasn’t done so already."

arts.ttl: Newcastle United return date for Anthony Gordon, Sven Botman update and Jamaal Lascelles reality
arts.sum: Howe also offered an update on Dutch defender Sven Botman who picked up a knee injury earlier in the year. Howe said: "I don't know if we will see Jamaal again (this season) and I don't want to set a target or time.

arts.ttl: Brentford player explains rejecting ‘4/5 concrete offers’ – Opportunities ‘were exciting’
arts.sum: Brentford captain Christian Nørgaard entered the final year of his contract at the start of this season. The Denmark international’s contract situation with the Bees had resulted in interest and firm offers from several clubs. He rejected them in order to commit his long-term future to Brentford. arts.ttl: Newcastle United opt for interesting ploy to get players back 'in the zone'
arts.sum: Newcastle United boss Eddie Howe had his squad back at St James' Park on Monday morning in order to help get the Magpies back into zone after a weekend of celebrations. Howe said: "I just try to work my hardest and do my best for the football club.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United interested in Juventus’ Dusan Vlahovic
arts.sum: Juventus’ Dusan Vlahovic could be inching towards an exit from the Serie A and there is now rising interest from Newcastle United. La Gazzetta dello Sport have reported today that…

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer makes major Newcastle United claim after Carabao Cup triumph
arts.sum: Alan Shearer has been heavily involved in Newcastle's celebrations after they won the Carabao Cup and the Toon legend believes no future triumph will ever top this one

arts.ttl: I predicted Newcastle United's Champions League fate with major Chelsea upset
arts.sum: Newcastle United's Carabao Cup win and subsequent celebrations are firmly in the rear-view mirror, with the club now looking ahead to securing a Champions League finish to crown off a season for the ages. Newcastle, as mentioned, took fifth spot, while Aston Villa [61], Chelsea [60], Bournemouth [58], Fulham [56] and Brighton [55] finished below the Carabao Cup winners, in that order.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United eye appointment that will leave Man United supremo Sir Jim Ratcliffe flabbergasted
arts.sum: Roche was appointed as Man United's first ever female chief operating officer when she joined the Old Trafford club in 2018. Eales said last month: "I’m focused on that transition (to a new CEO) which is why I’m working my notice and made the statement I did.
